name: Straight
svg_fragment: <g class="hw-rule"><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="{{rule_width}}" y2="0" stroke="var(--dna-border)" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="0" y1="-2" x2="{{rule_width}}" y2="-2" stroke="var(--dna-border)" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.3"/><line x1="0" y1="2" x2="{{rule_width}}" y2="2" stroke="var(--dna-border)" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.3"/></g>
